mnemonics: The SCARF Principle for Scalable, Resilient Architectures: S - Stateless components, C - Caching, A - Asynchronous processing, R - Redundancy, F - Fault tolerance
keyPoints: Microservices architecture decomposes an application into small, independent services.
Stateless design allows for horizontal scaling and improved resilience.
API gateways act as a single entry point to manage and route requests to backend services.
commonMistakes: Designing tightly coupled services instead of independent, loosely coupled microservices.
Ignoring security at the application layer by relying solely on the cloud provider's infrastructure security.
Underestimating the complexity of managing and monitoring a distributed microservices system.
